raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Context check","name":"What's been most on your mind at work lately?","description":"Safe opener that lets Lin set the context before any concern is introduced.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Late nights source","name":"What is driving the late nights now that the launches are done?","description":"Gets at the current source of load without assuming it is still launch-related.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Workload shape","name":"Where is your time going that you did not expect?","description":"Surfaces hidden work, interruptions, or obligations inflating the week.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Load ownership","name":"What part of the load is still yours to carry?","description":"Helps distinguish legitimate ownership from work that has stayed with Lin by default.","purpose":"competency","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Delegation boundary","name":"What work are you still holding that someone else could own?","description":"Tests delegation boundaries and whether senior-level work is being distributed well.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision bottleneck","name":"What are you waiting on that is keeping things heavy?","description":"Looks for dependencies or decisions that are quietly extending the workload.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Saying yes","name":"What are you saying yes to that you would rather not keep carrying?","description":"Surfaces priority drift and obligations that may be crowding out better use of time.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Role leverage","name":"Where do you want more leverage in how the product work is run?","description":"Explores how Lin wants the operating model to shift at a senior level.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Steadier rhythm","name":"What would make the next two weeks feel more sustainable?","description":"Closes on concrete changes that would reduce load or sharpen focus.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
